strategy_intent: Office trigger ke liye concise 3-step reset dena.
text: Quick reset: pause, 6 slow exhales, phir notes mein next single task type karke usi ka start karo.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main theek hona chahti hoon, single-task rule kaafi realistic lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Second systemic reframe se micro-step effect explain karna.
text: Overwhelm phase mein mind ko next tiny action dikhane se loop dheere padta hai aur control wapas aata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab stable lag raha hai, pehle jaisi panic-like feeling kam ho gayi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stability acknowledge karke confidence build karna.
text: Tumne breakdown edge se grounded mode tak move kiya hai, yeh strong recovery step hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kal dono side pressure aaye toh koi raasta hai kya jo turant follow kar saku?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: In-the-moment quick routine dena.
text: Haan, 1-min routine rakho: stop, 4 deep breaths, ek line mein next action likho, aur bas usi pe move karo.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh manageable hai, isse mujhe stuck feel kam hota hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Selected approach ko reinforce karna.
text: Bilkul sahi, manageable steps hi iss phase mein sabse zyada sustainable hote hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab dimaag blank wali feeling kaafi kam ho gayi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Closure ke liye tiny nightly anchors dena.
text: Aaj raat ke anchors: paani, 10 slow exhales, aur kal ka first-task note visible rakhna. Bas itna.

speaker: Seeker
text: Done, ab settled feel ho raha hai aur kal handle kar paungi lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final close mein progress aur worth separation reinforce karna.
text: Aaj tum guilt-flood se structured control tak aayi ho, yeh real progress hai. Crisis tough hai, par tumhari keemat kisi ek setback se kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main poori tarah sunn ho chuki hoon
text: Main poori tarah sunn ho chuki hoon, salary aane se pehle hi hospital bills ne sab kha liya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mild risk par warm normalising line ke saath Lens F se emotional shutdown mirror karna.
text: Aise jhatke ke baad numb feel karna bilkul natural hai. Jaise emotions aur soch dono freeze mode mein chale gaye hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, dimaag mein koi rasta nahi dikh raha, bas khaali-pan sa hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mild risk soothe karke Lens D se prolonged shutdown state mirror karna.
text: Kaafi time se yeh load build ho raha tha, aur ab body-mind dono ne jaise pause button daba diya ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sarkari naukri ka sapna pehle hi toot gaya tha, ab private job ki salary bhi tik nahi rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se feared life-collapse consequence softly mirror karna.
text: Jaise ek ke baad ek setback ne future ka sahara hi hila diya ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach bolun toh apna wajood hi bojh lag raha hai, ghar walon se nazar milana mushkil hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue par short restatement rakhna, Lens C se social-worth pressure hold karna.
text: Nazar milana bhi ab bahut bhaari lag raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Emotional flooding ho raha hai, par bahar se main bas chup rehti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Seeker ke words se ek focused question puchkar core pressure identify karna.
text: Jab flooding peak pe hoti hai, sabse pehla thought kis baat ka aata hai - paise ka, family expectation ka, ya khud par blame ka?

speaker: Seeker
text: Sabse pehle khud par blame aata hai ki main hi sab gadbad kar rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens B se burdened duty/self-blame frame mirror karna.
text: Tum har setback ka bojh khud pe le rahi ho, jaise sab sambhalna sirf tumhari duty ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, isi wajah se andar se khaali feel karti hoon aur kuch mehsoos hi nahi hota.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: C4+Sequential mein exhaustion aur numb-disconnection ko reflect karna.
text: Lagta hai numbness ke neeche bahut gehri thakan aur haar-pan hai - jaise system ko overload se bachne ke liye band hona pada ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh sunke thoda samjha gaya feel hua, warna mujhe lag raha tha main weird ho gayi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Emotion validate karke employment-shock reality se connect karna aur worth separate karna.
text: Jab repeated financial jhatke aur career disappointment saath aaye, aisa numb aur disconnected feel karna bilkul samajh aata hai. Is phase se tumhari keemat kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek, ab kya karoon jo abhi ke liye simple ho aur main kar paun?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Action se pehle ek baar systemic anecdote se silence-numbness pattern normalize karna.
text: Aise career-setback phases mein yeh numb pattern bahut common hai - sirf tumhara nahi, lekin log chhupate hain kyunki sabko lagta hai weak dikhna mana hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Koi raasta hai kya jisse aaj raat mind thoda settle ho jaye?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness par 3 low-effort options dena jo duty-compatible hon.
text: Teen quick options: 1) 4-min slow breathing, 2) hospital bill aur available cash ka 5-min note, 3) kal ka sirf ek first-task likhna. Jo easiest lage woh pick karo.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main second wala karungi, 5-min note manageable lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chosen suggestion ko step-by-step simple format mein chalwana.
text: Pehle note kholo, bill amount likho, fir available cash likho, gap amount circle karo, bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kiya, thoda control aaya. Blankness utni heavy nahi lag rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Structural reframe dekar self-blame reduce karna.
text: Repeated money shocks ke baad numb ya freeze hona common stress response hai, personal failure ka proof nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ab utna sunn nahi lag raha jitna pehle lag raha tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Progress aur agency ko reinforce karna.
text: Yeh strong shift hai - numb phase ke beech tumne practical control ka first handle bana liya.

speaker: Seeker
text: Raat ko phir wave aati hai, tab quick kya kar sakti hoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Night trigger ke liye 3 concise options dena.
text: Quick night reset: 10 slow exhales, paani ke 5 sips, aur kal ke first-step ki ek line likhkar side rakh do.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main theek hona chahti hoon, ek-line step meri speed ka lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Second structural reframe se micro-step effect explain karna.
text: Jab mind overload mein hota hai, tiny actionable step usko safety signal deta hai aur flooding dheere padti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab stable feel ho raha hai, pehle jaisa collapse feeling kam hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stability ko acknowledge karke confidence reinforce karna.
text: Tumne freeze se grounded action tak move kiya hai, yeh meaningful recovery sign hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kal office ke beech same wave aaye toh koi raasta hai kya jo 1 minute mein ho jaye?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: In-the-moment 1-min routine dena.
text: 1-min routine: pause, 4 deep breaths, notes mein next one task likho, aur usi ko start karo.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh manageable hai, isse panic mode se bahar aana easy lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chosen approach reinforce karna.
text: Bilkul, manageable aur repeatable step hi iss phase mein sabse useful hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab sunn feeling kaafi kam hui hai, body bhi thodi light lag rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Night closure ke liye 3 tiny anchors dena.
text: Aaj raat ke anchors: paani, 10 slow exhales, aur kal ka first-step note visible. Bas itna kaafi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Done, ab settled feel ho raha hai aur kal ka darr manageable lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final close mein progress aur worth separation reinforce karna.
text: Aaj tum numb-flood phase se structured control tak aayi ho, yeh real progress hai. Financial crisis tough hai, par tumhari keemat aur wajood isse kam nahi hote.
